title: Queenstown、OTA — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Queenstown、OTA的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Queenstown是OTA的一个城市，人口约29,000。New Zealand’s adventure capital, set on a stunning lake surrounded by mountains, world-famous for skiing, bungee jumping, and hiking.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
